name: Sid Caesar
abstract: Isaac Sidney Caesar (September 8, 1922 – February 12, 2014) was an American comic actor and comedian. With a career spanning 60 years, he was best known for two pioneering 1950s live television series: Your Show of Shows (1950–1954), which was a 90-minute weekly show watched by 60 million people, and its successor, Caesar's Hour (1954–19…

about_quotes.speaker: John LaBarbera
about_quotes.evidence: you remember the old Sid Caesar bit when he was Progress Hornsby... there’d be a jazz reference on television like Sid Caesar doing Progress Hornsby.

about_quotes.speaker: Mandel Johnny
about_quotes.evidence: he used to come and jam with us, I jammed with him a couple times up in the mountains
